response.step_by_step_log: The video features a vocal performance of "Nekuro no Hanayome" (Bride of Necro) by Shirakami Fubuki at the start, identified by on-screen text in Japanese. This song is originally by Kanon69. The performance is followed by a merchandise presentation for her birthday event, which does not contain vocal music. I searched for ' "ネクロの花嫁" 奏音69 lyrics Japanese and English ' and successfully found both original and translated lyrics.
response.global_summary: A performance of the song "Nekuro no Hanayome" (Bride of Necro) featuring Shirakami Fubuki, as part of her birthday 3D live event #冥ハロ2025.

scenes.description: Shirakami Fubuki performs 'Nekuro no Hanayome' on stage in a 3D environment, with lyrics appearing on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
物謂わぬ口唇に生気を吹き込んで、
今宵「 」は甦る。あの頃の姿で。
白肌の娘が咳をした。「この身体貴方に捧げるわ」
白服の医者が囁いた。「迎えに行くよ」
白肌の娘は朽ち果てた。世界の誰にも見棄てられ。
白服の医者は憐れんで、誰も知らない居場所で眠らせた。
朽ちてもまだ美しい顔で、
ふたりしかいない霊廟で、
医者は恋をした。
それは永遠の恋か。禁断の行為か。
また逢いたいと願うだけ。それが罪なのでしょうか。
物謂わぬ口唇に生気を吹き込んで、
今宵ふたりは結ばれる。祝福もされずに。
物謂わぬ口唇に生気を吹き込んで、
「迎えに行くよ」
枯れゆく旅の
取り繕って、
恋を謳って、また医者は
手を染め続けた。
やがて暴かれたのは醜い怪物で、
それを造り上げた医者は弁爆を叫んだ。
これは永遠の恋だ。彼女の願望だ。
死にゆくと決めたお前らが見棄てた女じゃないか。
嗚呼…哀しき花嫁。物謂えぬままで、
今宵ふたりは裁かれる。彼女を見棄てた人達の正義で。
正しいのはだあれ？
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The silent lips, breathing life into them,
Tonight, 'you' are revived, in your form from back then.
The pale-skinned girl coughed, "I will offer this body to you."
The white-clad doctor whispered, "I'm coming to pick you up."
The pale-skinned girl withered away, forsaken by everyone in the world.
The white-clad doctor took pity on her, and let her sleep in a place no one knows.
Her withered hands are still beautiful,
With that beautiful face, in that place only the two of us know,
In the ghost seconds, the doctor fell in love.
Is it an eternal love? A forbidden act?
I just wish to meet you again, is that a sin?
Breathing life into the silent lips,
Tonight, the two are bound, without even a blessing.
Breathing life into the pale skin,
"I'll go to meet you."
In the lonely travel to the land of no return,
The doctor continued to stain his hands.
Eventually, what was revealed was a hideous monster,
And the doctor who created it, shouted his justification.
This is an eternal love, her desire,
Those of you who decided to die, and abandoned her, aren't you?
Ah... poor bride, left unable to speak,
Tonight, the two are judged by the justice of the people who abandoned her.
Who is right?

scenes.description: A promotional image for Fubuki's birthday merchandise, accompanied by voiceover narration detailing the items.
